name: Omikenshi Co., Ltd.
summary: Omikenshi Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture, processing, and sale of rayon steple fiber and spinning yarn in Japan. The company also offers knitting, woven, and nonwoven fabric products; various towels and sleeping products; and various foods and beverages. In addition, it is involved in the software development and horticulture activities, as well as in the sale of basic cosmetics. Omikenshi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
